findings.title: Privacy Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling and consent mechanisms in the documentation.
assumptions: The documentation may contain ambiguous language regarding PII handling.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Review documentation to clarify PII handling and consent mechanisms.

metadata.mitigation: Clarify PII handling and consent mechanisms in documentation.
metadata.policy_rule: Privacy by design — data minimization at every layer

findings.title: Critical Android Notification Delivery Failure
findings.description: Push notifications are failing on Android 14 devices, affecting 8% of users. This is a critical issue that needs to be resolved to ensure reliable notification delivery.
assumptions: The failure rate is consistent across affected devices.

evidence.excerpt: Push notifications are failing on Android 14 devices, affecting 8% of users.

recommendations: Investigate and resolve the notification delivery failure on Android 14 devices.

metadata.mitigation: Resolve the notification delivery failure on Android 14 devices.

findings.title: High Risk of Pricing Misalignment
findings.description: Detected pricing risk keywords indicating potential issues with pricing strategy that may not align with user expectations or market standards.
assumptions: Pricing may not be competitive or clear to users.

evidence.excerpt: Detected pricing risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Review and adjust pricing strategy to ensure competitiveness and clarity.

metadata.policy_rule: Legal review is a gate, not a checkbox

findings.title: Accessibility Issues in Notification Center
findings.description: Users, particularly those using screen readers, face challenges navigating the notification center, indicating a need for improved accessibility features.
assumptions: Accessibility features are not fully implemented or tested.

evidence.excerpt: Several users face challenges navigating the notification center.

recommendations: Enhance the notification center to ensure it is navigable by users with screen readers.

metadata.mitigation: Improve accessibility features in the notification center.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk with Data Handling Policies
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicating potential issues with adherence to GDPR and CCPA regulations regarding data handling and retention.
assumptions: Data handling practices may not fully comply with regulations.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 2 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a compliance audit to ensure adherence to GDPR and CCPA.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 2 compliance, 1 privacy, 1 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (2 blockers, 1 warnings).
